word: H4122 - מַהֵר שָׁלָל חָשׁ בַּז - Mahêr Shâlâl Châsh Baz - mah-hare' shaw-lawl' khawsh baz - Maher-sha-lal-bash-baz

sections.paragraph:
מהר שׁלל חשׁ בּז - mahêr shâlâl châsh baz - mah-hare' shaw-lawl' khawsh baz

From H4118 and H7998 and H2363 and H957; hasting (as he (the enemy) to the) booty, swift (to the) prey; Maher-Shalal Chash-Baz; the symbolical name of the son of Isaiah: - Maher-shalal-hash-baz.
